title: Metal Complexes of 2-Hydroxy 4-Methyl 5-Chloro Acetophenone Oxime
author: R. N. SAKSENA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Govt. Science College, (Jiwaji University), Gwalior 

 ( Received  5  February  1970;  revised MSS received  27  June  1972) 

 2-hydroxy 4-methyl 5-chloro acetophenone oxime has been prepared, purified and used as chelatometric reagent for copper and nickel. The structures of complexes have been established by conductometric methods and by elemental analysis. Infra-red study of the complexes have been done with a view to study how far the I R spectra help in establishing the chelation and structure of complexes.
